movie.synopsis: Main waapas Aaunga (2026) Main wapas Aaunga (2026) Main Vapas Aaunga (2026) An elderly man remains haunted by a childhood romance and memories of love lost during the 1947 Partition of India. As he shares his story with his grandson, the past unfolds through memories of migration, longing, and a love that endures across generations.
